llm_response:
Subject: Urgent Request for Project Extension

Dear Professor Smith,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for the upcoming group project, which is currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for reaching out with such short notice, as I understand the importance of adhering to the established deadline. There are two primary reasons for my request. First, an unexpected family emergency has arisen, requiring my immediate attention and presence at home during what would have been our final planning session. Second, a critical team member fell ill yesterday, leaving us without essential data analysis that was scheduled to be completed today. Without this specific background information, our presentation lacks the necessary depth required for a high-quality submission. I have already contacted the absent member to ensure they will provide their notes by tomorrow evening. I am committed to submitting a thorough and polished final product that meets all your expectations. Would it be possible to extend the deadline by forty-eight hours? This additional time would allow us to refine our arguments and ensure accuracy. Thank you for your understanding and consideration of my situation.

Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
